arts.ttl: FIFA confirm 10-day transfer window transformation with major impact for Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: FIFA have announced a new 10-day transfer window for next summer to accommodate the Club World Cup, which could involve Liverpool's out-of-contract players

arts.ttl: 'Unlucky' Liverpool star snub is good news for Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo has been in and out of the side at the start of the season and has been urged to take his chances when they come.

arts.ttl: “What I’m told is that today” – Fabrizio Romano drops latest update on Trent Alexander-Arnold’s contract situation
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold’s future at Liverpool is shrouded in uncertainty, with Real Madrid reportedly showing strong interest in signing the talented right-back. His current contract with the club is set to expire next summer, yet there is no such update regarding a new deal as yet. The unusual contract situation has raised alarms among fans and […] The post “What I’m told is that today” – Fabrizio Romano drops latest update on Trent Alexander-Arnold’s contract situation appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Joshua Zirkzee made Liverpool trip with Man United blessing
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee was given permission by Manchester United to travel to meet up with his former Bologna team-mates at their team hotel in Liverpool ahead of the Champions League clash with the Reds at Anfield

arts.ttl: Newcastle United want to copy Liverpool as Paul Mitchell cites £52.5m double deal
arts.sum: Imitation is the greatest form of flattery, and the Saudi Public Investment Fund now want Newcastle United to mirror one aspect of Liverpool’s player trading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains why he avoids his friends and family before Liverpool matches
arts.sum: Arne Slot has made a record-breaking start to life as Liverpool manager and the Dutch tactician's pre-match preparations are a crucial part of why he's enjoyed success during his short time at Anfield

arts.ttl: Real Madrid take MAJOR step in Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer from Liverpool
arts.sum: Real Madrid have taken the next step in luring Trent Alexander-Arnold from Liverpool next summer, with reports in Spain claiming that contact has been made between the Spanish giants and the player. The report claims that Alexander-Arnold is not a ‘strategic’ signing operated over the long-term like that of Vinicius Junior or Endrick, but rather a market opportunity due to Alexander-Arnold’s contractual situation, like the deals to bring Kylian Mbappe and Antonio Rudiger to Madrid in recent times.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Eye Move for 'Brilliant' 42m Star as Mohamed Salah Replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are willing to splash out 42m on Borussia Dortmund attacker Karim Adeyemi.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's best and worst players from nervy Bologna victory
arts.sum: The 32-year-old now has the most goals by an African in the competition's history with 45, overtaking Didier Drogba, and is also the first Liverpool player to score in five consecutive Champions League games at Anfield. Liverpool continued their winning start to the new Champions League campaign by seeing off Serie A side Bologna 2-0 at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool boost, director claims 'remarkable' wonderkid 'will be sold' for £30m
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are just two of the clubs in the race...
